beer.beer_description: Peachquency is a juicy NZ-style IPA featuring Peacherine, Motueka, and Riwaka hops. Bursting with peach, passionfruit, and zesty lime flavours, it’s hazy, bright, and fruit-forward, a brew tuned to pure flavour energy. Vibrant aromas and a crisp, clean finish invite you to taste the frequency of New Zealand hops at their most playful and aromatic.

items.badge_description: You may not be able to see through the haze, but that juicy, hoppy goodness goes down smooth. What started as a trend is here to stay. That's 115 different beers with the style of IPA - New England / Hazy, Pale Ale - New England / Hazy, IPA - Milkshake, or Pale Ale - Milkshake. Try 5 more for Level 24!

user.bio:
Keeping my friends close,
 but my beers closer.

items.checkin_comment: A nice beer, but didn't get that grassy NZ hit I was expecting. A tasty peachy flavour upfront, but not enough depth through the body.

user.bio:
Craft Beer is never gonna give you up, 
never gonna let you down.

items.comment: Fair call, some NZ hops can lean green or herbal, but they’re best known for big tropical, fruit-forward, white wine vibes we love.

user.bio: Just a ordinary guy in search for extraordinary beers
UT Moderator, Craft beer nut. Love the hops, love the darks, love the travelling and hanging out with beery people!

items.badge_name: Super Style: IPA - New England / Hazy (Level 30)
items.badge_description: The haze craze is here for days. The third in our series of “Super Style” badges, this one celebrates New England-style / hazy IPAs, which ranked as the 2nd most checked-in style of 2021. AVAILABLE ONLY TO UNTAPPD INSIDERS.
